note: Hand-curated seed catalog. Refresh with `npm run catalog:build` once network access is available. The AI prompt falls back to this file when the user is offline or the fetch fails.

MCP Tools.name: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk
MCP Tools.description: Official TypeScript SDK for the Model Context Protocol. Build MCP servers and clients that any agent can connect to.

MCP Tools.name: @modelcontextprotocol/inspector
MCP Tools.description: Visual debugger and inspector for MCP servers. Try tools, browse resources, watch traffic.

MCP Tools.name: @playwright/mcp
MCP Tools.description: MCP server that exposes Playwright browser automation as agent-callable tools.

MCP Tools.name: mcp-server-filesystem
MCP Tools.description: Official MCP server giving agents safe, sandboxed read/write access to the local filesystem.

MCP Tools.name: @upstash/context7-mcp
MCP Tools.description: MCP server that fetches version-pinned library docs into the agent's context on demand.

MCP Tools.name: @kirbah/mcp-youtube
MCP Tools.description: MCP server exposing YouTube Data API v3 as token-optimized structured tools.

MCP Tools.name: @browserbasehq/mcp-server-browserbase
MCP Tools.description: MCP server launching a remote browser via Browserbase; useful for scraping and e2e from agents.

MCP Tools.name: @mcp-dock/desktop-commander
MCP Tools.description: MCP server that gives agents terminal, file, and process control on the host machine.

Skills.name: @mastra/core
Skills.description: TypeScript-first framework for building AI agents with tools, memory, workflows, and observability.

Skills.name: langchain
Skills.description: The canonical LLM orchestration library. Chains, agents, RAG, tool calling, and 100+ integrations.

Skills.name: @langchain/core
Skills.description: Core abstractions (messages, prompts, tools, output parsers) used by every LangChain integration.

Skills.name: llamaindex
Skills.description: Data framework for LLM apps: ingestion, indexing, retrieval, query engines.

Skills.name: @agentica/core
Skills.description: TypeScript library specialised in LLM function calling and typed tool schemas.

Skills.name: ai
Skills.description: Vercel AI SDK. Unified interface for OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Mistral, Bedrock, etc., plus streaming and React hooks.

Skills.name: @ai-sdk/react
Skills.description: React hooks (useChat, useCompletion, useObject) for the Vercel AI SDK.

Skills.name: @cloudflare/codemode
Skills.description: Generate executable code on the LLM side that performs tool calls — cheaper and more reliable than JSON schemas for complex tool sets.

Agents.name: @anthropic-ai/sdk
Agents.description: Official TypeScript SDK for the Anthropic Claude API. Tool use, vision, prompt caching, batching.

Agents.name: openai
Agents.description: Official OpenAI Node SDK. Chat, completions, embeddings, images, tools, assistants.

Agents.name: @google/generative-ai
Agents.description: Official Google SDK for Gemini models (text, vision, embeddings).

Agents.name: groq-sdk
Agents.description: OpenAI-compatible client for Groq's ultra-low-latency inference.

Agents.name: @mistralai/mistralai
Agents.description: Official Mistral AI client (chat, embeddings, function calling).

Agents.name: bedrock-agentcore
Agents.description: AWS Bedrock AgentCore SDK for hosted autonomous agents with memory, tools, and runtime sandboxes.

Agents.name: @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk
Agents.description: SDK for building Claude Code-style agents that can read codebases, edit files, and run workflows autonomously.

Memory.name: @pinecone-database/pinecone
Memory.description: Managed vector database. Hybrid search, metadata filtering, namespaces.

Memory.name: chromadb
Memory.description: Embedded vector database. Great for local-first RAG and prototypes.

Memory.name: @qdrant/js-client-rest
Memory.description: Qdrant vector DB client. Self-host or cloud; strong filtering.

Memory.name: @upstash/redis
Memory.description: Serverless Redis with vector search. Pay-per-request, edge-friendly.

Memory.name: mem0ai
Memory.description: Long-term memory layer for LLM apps. Automatic fact extraction and recall.

Memory.name: @xenova/transformers
Memory.description: Run embeddings and small LLMs in-browser or Node via ONNX. No API keys.

Orchestrators.name: langchain
Orchestrators.description: Chains and agents across providers. Use when you need a battle-tested orchestrator.

Orchestrators.name: @langchain/langgraph
Orchestrators.description: Graph-based stateful agent runtime. Built for multi-step, branching workflows.

Orchestrators.name: @mastra/core
Orchestrators.description: All-in-one TS agent framework: workflows, agents, memory, RAG, observability.

Orchestrators.name: @anthropic-ai/agent-sdk
Orchestrators.description: Build Claude Code-style agents (filesystem, shell, edit, recovery loops).

Orchestrators.name: llamaindex
Orchestrators.description: Data-first orchestration: load → index → query. Best for RAG-heavy apps.

Orchestrators.name: @aws-sdk/client-bedrock-runtime
Orchestrators.description: AWS SDK module for invoking Bedrock models with tool use and streaming.

Context Windows.name: tiktoken
Context Windows.description: OpenAI's BPE tokenizer. Count tokens for any OpenAI/gpt-4o model. Use to budget prompts and chunk documents.

Context Windows.name: gpt-tokenizer
Context Windows.description: Pure-JS tokenizer compatible with tiktoken. No native bindings; works in browser/edge.

Context Windows.name: js-tiktoken-lite
Context Windows.description: Lightweight tiktoken port for browsers; no WASM.

Context Windows.name: llm-context
Context Windows.description: Compute effective context windows per model, accounting for tool schemas, system prompts, and reserved output tokens.

Context Windows.name: @martian-engineering/lossless-claw
Context Windows.description: DAG-based conversation summarisation with threshold compaction for lossless long context.

Prompt Templates.name: @langchain/core/prompts
Prompt Templates.description: PromptTemplate, ChatPromptTemplate, FewShotPromptTemplate, and partial-variable helpers.

Prompt Templates.name: mustache
Prompt Templates.description: Tiny, dependency-free {{var}} templating. Works in any JS runtime.

Prompt Templates.name: handlebars
Prompt Templates.description: Mustache-compatible superset with helpers, partials, and precompilation.

Prompt Templates.name: liquidjs
Prompt Templates.description: Shopify Liquid template engine for JS. Safe by default (no eval).

Prompt Templates.name: nunjucks
Prompt Templates.description: Rich Jinja2-style templating with autoescape, async filters, and inheritance.

Logging and Telemetry.name: langfuse
Logging and Telemetry.description: Open-source LLM observability: traces, prompt management, evals, datasets.

Logging and Telemetry.name: @langfuse/client
Logging and Telemetry.description: Lightweight client for the Langfuse observability platform.

Logging and Telemetry.name: helicone
Logging and Telemetry.description: Drop-in LLM observability proxy. Logs every request, supports caching, rate limits, and evals.

Logging and Telemetry.name: langsmith
Logging and Telemetry.description: LangChain's hosted tracing and evaluation suite.

Logging and Telemetry.name: pino
Logging and Telemetry.description: Very fast, low-overhead JSON logger. The default for production Node services.

Logging and Telemetry.name: @opentelemetry/sdk-trace-node
Logging and Telemetry.description: OpenTelemetry Node SDK. Vendor-neutral traces and metrics for any service.

Logging and Telemetry.name: @opentelemetry/sdk-trace-web
Logging and Telemetry.description: OpenTelemetry browser SDK for the renderer side of Electron apps.

Logging and Telemetry.name: @logtape/logtape
Logging and Telemetry.description: Universal structured logging that works in Node, browser, Deno, and workers.
